subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the blessed Tree, it hath been some time since any tidings have been received from that exalted branch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره المبارکه چندیست که خبری از آن فرع رفیع نرسیده و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
